The V2 strict security layer adds `DaoSecurityPolicy`, `ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot`, `ProposalProofVerification`, threshold-attested proof records, canonical payload binding, and expiry checks."}]}]

20:["$","$1","block-38",{"children":["$","ul","l-150",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-150-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"on-chain proof anchors are verified"}],["$","li","l-150-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"on-chain parallel verification receipts are reviewed"}],["$","li","l-150-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"V2 strict proof policy is initialized for the target DAO when strict finalization is required"}],["$","li","l-150-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"any policy change after initialization is performed through `update_dao_security_policy_v2` and reviewed as monotonic, not a rollback"}],["$","li","l-150-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot` exists for proposals that will use V2 strict finalization"}],["$","li","l-150-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal policy snapshots are treated as immutable object-level records once captured"}],["$","li","l-150-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"off-chain proof generation and proving flow are reviewed"}],["$","li","l-150-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"explorer-visible anchor path is documented"}],["$","li","l-150-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"operator messaging does not overstate the enforcement boundary"}]]}]}]
